case_title: HONG AN JIN VS. JASON MARKS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIN, HONG AN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKS, JASON $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIN, HONG AN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKS, JASON $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,865.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IS $2,000.00 IN STATUTORY DAMAGES AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH.
